package.exclusions_text:
- Cross Consultation.
- Virology Disposable Kit.
- Ventilator Charges.
- Patient attender Food & Beverages, additional orders.
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure.
- Diabetic Management.
- Beyond the package days, all services and investigations are charged based on actual costs.
package.documentation_notes:
- Clean Markdown / TKR-Single-Robo: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- FC History / ROBOTIC TKR - UNILATERAL: Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.

Version A (current):
- Hospital Stay: 2 days ward, 1 day ICU
- Pharmacy: IP medicines up to ₹15,000 + OT medicines up to ₹50,000
- Implants: Up to ₹90,000
- Investigations: ₹7,260 (Twin) / ₹7,920 (Single)
- Surgeon Charges: Up to ₹65,000
- Anaesthesia Charges: Up to ₹16,250
- Assistant Surgeon & Anaesthesia: As per hospital policy
- OT & Procedure Charges: OT (3 hours), Major instrument charges, OT disinfection charges, CSSD charges for GA
- Routine Consumables & Nursing: Syringe pump (3 days), Minor dressing (×2), Monitor (2 days), Ward consumables (3 days), Post-surgery recovery charges
- Catheter Care: Foley's catheterization, Foley's catheter removal
- Pre-operative Care: Pre-anaesthetist check, Warmer
- Medical Records: Medical records (for stay > 1 day)
- Consultations (1 each): Physician, Endocrinology, Nephrology, Cardiology, Pulmonology
- Robotic Surgery: Unilateral Robotic TKR

- Virology disposable kit
- Ventilator charges
